repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 191: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE assume statements are placed in a component implementation (ADIRU.EMV2) instead of a component type -> Move the entire annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2 to ADIRU
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 193: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc1_input'.: Port names acc1_input, acc1_output are not visible in AGREE; only subcomponent names are visible, and AGREE cannot resolve port references without type context -> Remove all port equality and flow expressions (lines 191-205) since ports cannot be referenced in AGREE without type-level visibility
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl'.: ADIRU.impl is an implementation name, not a component type; AGREE cannot compare component instances to implementation names -> Remove the deployment_mapping assumption entirely, as it compares subcomponents to implementation names which are not valid AGREE expressions

line 192: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: assume statement in implementation annex -> move annex block from ADIRU.EMV2 to ADIRU
line 195: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_pr': reference to subcomponent not visible in this scope -> remove reference to acc_pr
line 195: Couldn't resolve reference to 'main_cpu': reference to processor not visible in this scope -> remove reference to main_cpu
line 195: Couldn't resolve reference to 'part1': reference to processor partition not visible in this scope -> remove reference to part1
line 198: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_hm_pr': reference to subcomponent not visible in this scope -> remove reference to acc_hm_pr

line 192: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: assume statement in component implementation annex -> move the assume statement from ADIRU.EMV2 implementation annex to ADIRU type annex
line 186: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: assume statement in implementation annex block -> move the assume statement from ADIRU.EMV2 implementation to ADIRU type

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 186: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: Assume statement is placed in an annex owned by a component implementation (ADIRU.EMV2), which is not a component type -> Move the annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2 to ADIRU (component type)
